scripts.test: cd server && npx vitest run && cd ../client && npx vitest run
scripts.stress:voting: STRESS_TARGET=http://localhost:3000 STRESS_PLAYERS=10 STRESS_AUDIENCE=30 STRESS_ROUNDS=3 tsx stress/stress-test.ts
scripts.stress:extreme: STRESS_TARGET=http://localhost:3000 STRESS_PLAYERS=20 STRESS_AUDIENCE=40 STRESS_ROUNDS=5 tsx stress/stress-test.ts
scripts.stress:multiroom: STRESS_TARGET=http://localhost:3000 STRESS_ROOMS=4 STRESS_PLAYERS=5 STRESS_AUDIENCE=10 STRESS_ROUNDS=5 tsx stress/multi-room-stress.ts
